name: paat-plugins
description: Claude Code plugins for development workflows and productivity

plugins.name: gemini-cli
plugins.description: Integrate Google's Gemini CLI into Claude Code for second opinions, dual code reviews, and AI-assisted explanations

plugins.name: reddit-fetch
plugins.description: Research any topic using Reddit via Gemini CLI's web access capabilities

plugins.name: tribunal-review
plugins.description: Multi-provider code review with Codex, Gemini, and Opus arbitration

plugins.name: agent-sync
plugins.description: Generate AGENTS.md from Claude Code project configuration files

plugins.name: browser-test-router
plugins.description: Multi-model delegation for browser testing — Haiku for mechanics, Sonnet for comparison, Opus for analysis

plugins.name: saas-startup-team
plugins.description: SaaS startup simulation — business founder, tech founder, and growth hacker iterate via file-based handoffs using Agent Teams, with on-demand consultants (lawyer for compliance, UX tester for usability and accessibility), building the product, acquiring customers, and iterating with one-shot improvements

plugins.name: comfyui
plugins.description: Manage ComfyUI workflows, models, and API — build workflows from natural language, queue executions, monitor progress, and download models

plugins.name: video-guide
plugins.description: Create professional video guides with TTS narration, screen recording, and YouTube upload

plugins.name: google-ads-strategist
plugins.description: Senior Google Ads strategist — iterative campaign design + Chrome-based creation in PAUSED state for investor review. Browser verification via Ad Preview Tool, SERP capture, and Ads Transparency Center. Enforces hypothesis discipline, buyer-intent + product-value gates, and accumulates learnings.
